parameters.content:
## Lead Generation Flow

### How it works

1. The workflow is triggered manually to start the lead generation process.
2. A Google Sheet is created and read to retrieve configuration data.
3. Search tasks are built from the configuration and executed on Google Maps.
4. Search results are processed to remove duplicates and check for the presence of websites.
5. Leads with or without emails are formatted and merged as needed.
6. The final compiled leads are saved into a Google Sheets document.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Ensure Google Sheets API credentials are set up and configured.
- [ ] Verify manual trigger settings are properly defined.
- [ ] Ensure all nodes are authorized and have correct permissions.

### Customization

Nodes related to data processing and lead formatting can be customized as per specific business needs.

## Initialize workflow

Start the workflow and create a results sheet in Google Sheets.

## Configure and prepare tasks

Read configuration from the sheet and prepare search tasks.

## Execute and process searches

Perform search on Google Maps, process results and remove duplicates.

## Website check and lead formatting

Check for website, scrape if available, and format leads with emails.

## Google search fallback

Merge leads for Google search and extract emails if needed.

## Merge and save leads

Merge all accumulated leads and save to the results sheet in Google Sheets.

nodes.name: Start Lead Generation
nodes.notes: Click to start the workflow manually

nodes.name: Create Leads Sheet
nodes.notes: Creates a new sheet with timestamp to store results

nodes.name: Read Configurations
nodes.notes: Reads search queries and parameters from config sheet

nodes.name: Initialize Search Tasks
nodes.notes: Converts config into multiple search tasks with pagination (20 results per page)

nodes.name: Search in Google Maps
nodes.notes: Fetches business listings from Google Maps based on query and location

nodes.name: Split Local Results
nodes.notes: Separates each business into individual items for processing

nodes.name: Deduplicate Local Results
nodes.notes: Removes duplicate businesses based on name and address

nodes.name: Check Website Availability
nodes.notes: Checks if business has a website - TRUE path scrapes it, FALSE path searches Google

nodes.name: Scrape Website Data
nodes.notes: Scrapes the business website to extract email addresses

nodes.name: Check for Emails
nodes.notes: Checks if emails were found on website - TRUE adds them, FALSE searches Google

nodes.name: Format Lead With Contact
nodes.notes: Prepares lead data including scraped emails for output

nodes.name: Format Lead Without Contact
nodes.notes: Prepares lead data without emails (will search Google next)

nodes.name: Merge Leads for Google Search
nodes.notes: Combines leads without website or without scraped emails for Google search

nodes.name: Find Emails Via Google
nodes.notes: Searches Google to find email addresses for businesses

nodes.name: Extract Emails
nodes.notes: Extracts email addresses from Google search results using regex

nodes.name: Combine All Leads
nodes.notes: Combines all leads (with website emails and Google-found emails)

nodes.name: Append to Leads Sheet
nodes.notes: Writes all found leads to the timestamped results sheet
